## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Konstantine and GrowthX.ai](https://fathom.video/share/6_AUhvDfmeMzu4x713Wr7_usgvRf__P8?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX.ai is transitioning from an SEO agency to building an AI-powered tool for growth/marketing](https://fathom.video/share/6_AUhvDfmeMzu4x713Wr7_usgvRf__P8?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [Konstantine demonstrated sophisticated SEO analytics capabilities that could complement GrowthX's offerings](https://fathom.video/share/6_AUhvDfmeMzu4x713Wr7_usgvRf__P8?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)
  - [Further discussion needed to identify specific collaboration opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/6_AUhvDfmeMzu4x713Wr7_usgvRf__P8?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX.ai's Business Model and Evolution

  - [Started as SEO-focused agency, now expanding to broader content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/6_AUhvDfmeMzu4x713Wr7_usgvRf__P8?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [\~60 employees, serving \~40 B2B SaaS clients](https://fathom.video/share/6_AUhvDfmeMzu4x713Wr7_usgvRf__P8?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)
  - [Recently raised funding to build internal AI tool for knowledge workers](https://fathom.video/share/6_AUhvDfmeMzu4x713Wr7_usgvRf__P8?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [Transitioning from AeroFS to proprietary workflows for scalability](https://fathom.video/share/6_AUhvDfmeMzu4x713Wr7_usgvRf__P8?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)

### GrowthX.ai's Service Offering

  - [Own content marketing function for clients, primarily SEO-driven](https://fathom.video/share/6_AUhvDfmeMzu4x713Wr7_usgvRf__P8?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [Expanding into social media, case studies, LLM monitoring](https://fathom.video/share/6_AUhvDfmeMzu4x713Wr7_usgvRf__P8?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [Aspiring to own more of the marketing funnel](https://fathom.video/share/6_AUhvDfmeMzu4x713Wr7_usgvRf__P8?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Delivered via "pods" with mix of domain experts and technical roles](https://fathom.video/share/6_AUhvDfmeMzu4x713Wr7_usgvRf__P8?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)

### Konstantine's SEO Analytics Approach

  - [Blends data from multiple sources (GSC, GA, CRM, etc.) for holistic view](https://fathom.video/share/6_AUhvDfmeMzu4x713Wr7_usgvRf__P8?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [Maps keywords to URLs, clusters topics, identifies content gaps](https://fathom.video/share/6_AUhvDfmeMzu4x713Wr7_usgvRf__P8?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Attributes value/conversions to specific keywords and pages](https://fathom.video/share/6_AUhvDfmeMzu4x713Wr7_usgvRf__P8?tab=summary&timestamp=1485.0)
  - [Uses custom framework for "product-driven coverage" in content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/6_AUhvDfmeMzu4x713Wr7_usgvRf__P8?tab=summary&timestamp=1855.0)

### AI and SEO Evolution

  - [Both parties exploring how to adapt to AI-driven search landscape](https://fathom.video/share/6_AUhvDfmeMzu4x713Wr7_usgvRf__P8?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)
  - [Focus on referral traffic, modern link building, LLM-optimized content](https://fathom.video/share/6_AUhvDfmeMzu4x713Wr7_usgvRf__P8?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
  - [Tracking relevant prompts that drive customer acquisition](https://fathom.video/share/6_AUhvDfmeMzu4x713Wr7_usgvRf__P8?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [Konstantine could bring business-driven insights and advanced analytics](https://fathom.video/share/6_AUhvDfmeMzu4x713Wr7_usgvRf__P8?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)
  - [GrowthX interested in Konstantine's technical skills for internal dashboards](https://fathom.video/share/6_AUhvDfmeMzu4x713Wr7_usgvRf__P8?tab=summary&timestamp=2223.0)
  - [Possible synergy between Konstantine's frameworks and GrowthX's AI capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/6_AUhvDfmeMzu4x713Wr7_usgvRf__P8?tab=summary&timestamp=2160.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to discuss internally, particularly with team member working on client dashboards](https://fathom.video/share/6_AUhvDfmeMzu4x713Wr7_usgvRf__P8?tab=summary&timestamp=2223.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up call for more in-depth discussion of collaboration possibilities](https://fathom.video/share/6_AUhvDfmeMzu4x713Wr7_usgvRf__P8?tab=summary&timestamp=2245.0)
  - [Konstantine to await update from Jason on LinkedIn regarding next steps](https://fathom.video/share/6_AUhvDfmeMzu4x713Wr7_usgvRf__P8?tab=summary&timestamp=2259.0)
